matched_testcase_text: test case id: tc-signal-007 title: confirm signal with invalid token module: signal source pages: 4 preconditions: signal is inserted successfully. test data: - token: invalid token test steps: 1. click on the "confirm signal" button. 2. enter the invalid token. 3. click on the "confirm" button. 4. wait for the firebase/firestore and firebase/storage components to process the confirmation. 5. check if the signal confirmation fails due to an invalid token. expected result: the signal confirmation should fail and display an error message.
